# Code of Conduct

## Our pledge

SecureScope is a private project maintained by **Omar Rao**. Everyone who
interacts with the project — through issues, discussions, or any other channel —
is expected to help keep those interactions respectful, professional, and
harassment-free, regardless of background or experience level.

## Expected behaviour

- Be respectful, constructive, and considerate.
- Focus on the technical substance; critique ideas, not people.
- Assume good faith and keep discussions on topic.
- Report security issues privately (see [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md)) rather
  than in public issues.

## Unacceptable behaviour

- Harassment, discrimination, or personal attacks of any kind.
- Publishing others' private information without consent.
- Spam, trolling, or deliberately disruptive conduct.
- Any use of the project or its channels for unlawful activity.

## Scope

This code applies within all project spaces (the repository, issues, pull
requests, and discussions) and whenever an individual is representing the
project in public.

## Enforcement

Reports of unacceptable behaviour can be sent privately to the maintainer:

- **Omar Rao** — [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/omarrao/)

The maintainer will review and act on reports at their discretion, including
warning, removing content, or blocking participants. Decisions are final.

---

*Adapted, in spirit, from the [Contributor Covenant](https://www.contributor-covenant.org/).*
